candidate.completion: stop making the Roomba my most consistent relationship.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop making the Roomba my most consistent relationship.

evaluation.rationale: The Roomba-as-relationship pivot is specific and legible, turning loneliness into a clean joke about consistency and attachment. It feels fresh and true, but the sentence is a bit long and mechanically phrased, which blunts some of the force and elegance.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
